name: agent-world-monorepo
description: Two independent projects (frontend, backend) co-located. See CLAUDE.md before modifying.

scripts.build: pnpm --dir backend build && pnpm --dir frontend build
scripts.test: pnpm --dir backend test && pnpm --dir frontend test
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir backend lint && pnpm --dir frontend lint
scripts.install:all: pnpm --dir backend install && pnpm --dir frontend install
